<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/federation/facts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Return scope-filtered, HLC-cursor-paged facts to an authenticated peer.

Covered by Spec-05-Federation-Trust.
